basic_details.short_information: The Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has officially announced the Research Associate Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates who are up to 45 years of age and hold a Ph.D. in Agricultural Microbiology or a Master's degree in the relevant subject with the prescribed experience, NET qualification (where applicable), and publication requirements are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 40 years for Men & 45 years for Women

qualification.education_qualification: Ph. D. in Agricultural Microbiology or Master's degree in relevant subject with 4-5 years of Bachelor's degree having first division
qualification.details: Ph. D. in Agricultural Microbiology or Master's degree in relevant subject with 4-5 years of Bachelor's degree having first division or equivalent overall grade point average with at least 3 years of respective teaching/research experience as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/Training/Other engagements. Published one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (≥4.0) Journal. Candidates having post-graduate degree in Basic Science with 3 years Bachelor's degree and 2 years Master's degree should have NET qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs.61,000/- + HRA per month for Master's Degree holders Rs.67,000/- + HRA per month for Ph.D. degree holders

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ANGRAU Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ANGRAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ANGRAU Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph. D. in Agricultural Microbiology or Master's degree in relevant subject with 4-5 years of Bachelor's degree having first division or equivalent overall grade point average with at least 3 years of respective teaching/research experience as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/Training/Other engagements. Published one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (≥4.0) Journal. Candidates having post-graduate degree in Basic Science with 3 years Bachelor's degree and 2 years Master's degree should have NET qualification.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 40 years for Men & 45 years for Women

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs.61,000/- + HRA per month for Master's Degree holders Rs.67,000/- + HRA per month for Ph.D. degree holders

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate position at ANGRAU is scheduled for 23rd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Agricultural Microbiology or a Master's degree in a relevant subject with specific Bachelor's degree and experience criteria, including research paper publication. NET qualification is also required for certain candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANGRAU Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate post is 45 years. There is a relaxation for women, with an upper age limit of 45 years, while for men it is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- + HRA per month for Master's degree holders and Rs. 67,000/- + HRA per month for Ph.D. degree holders.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this ANGRAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate post against Scientist (Microbiology).

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The specific address will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Research Associate position is Contractual.
